critique.overall: Publish the glance and the back canvas; retake the macro before they leave.
strengths: Even, warm light across the whole set
Backgrounds stay clean behind the subject

photos.note: Hero shot — tone and shape razor sharp
Soft focus on the ends undercuts the finish
photos.retakeTip: Step closer and tap to focus on the ends

photos.note: Unknown verdicts stay decodable on old builds
